items.name: matches
items.description: A small box of matches with a few sticks left inside.
items.examine_text: An old-fashioned matchbox with a faded label. When you open it, a handful of usable matches remain.

items.name: candlestick
items.description: A copper candlestick holding half a candle.
items.examine_text: A finely made copper candlestick with half a white candle set into it. The wick looks almost new.

items.name: worn carpet
items.description: A faded red Persian carpet spread across the floor.
items.examine_text: This must once have been a magnificent Persian carpet. Now it is discolored, dusty, and curling at the edges. There does not seem to be anything hidden underneath.

items.name: sealed door
items.description: The castle's main door, sealed behind a mysterious violet glow.
items.examine_text: A heavy oak door wrapped in shimmering violet magic. At the center of the seal is an unusual keyhole, shaped for some special key. Powerful energy radiates from the wood.

items.name: portrait
items.description: An old portrait hangs on the wall, showing an elderly man in robes.
items.examine_text: The painting depicts a silver-haired old man in deep purple alchemist's robes. His gaze is stern and mysterious, and in one hand he grips a strangely shaped key. A small inscription at the bottom reads: 'Moriarty, the Awakened.' The key in his hand appears to be made from three separate pieces.

items.name: torch sconce
items.description: An iron wall sconce where a torch once rested.
items.examine_text: An iron torch holder bolted to the wall. The torch itself disappeared long ago.

items.name: bookshelf
items.description: A tall wooden shelf packed with ancient books.
items.examine_text: The shelves rise all the way to the ceiling. Most of the books concern alchemy, occult studies, and ancient history. You flip through a few, but many are too rotten to read properly.

items.name: reading table
items.description: A sturdy oak table in the middle of the room.
items.examine_text: A solid oak reading table covered in old ink stains and scratches. A scroll has been left on top of it.

items.name: scroll
items.description: An old scroll with something written on it.
items.examine_text: You carefully unroll the yellowed parchment. In elegant handwriting it says: 'When the sun sinks in the west, the bell tower will sound three times. Remember this number, for it will open the path to the secret.' Beneath the writing is a sketch of a chest labeled with the number '3'.

items.name: trapdoor
items.description: A ceiling trapdoor leading up to the attic.
items.examine_text: A wooden trapdoor in the ceiling leads up to the attic, but it is mounted too high to reach. A ladder would probably solve that problem.

items.name: old chest
items.description: An old dust-covered chest fitted with a numeric lock.
items.examine_text: A weathered chest made from dark wood and carved with intricate patterns. A three-digit numeric lock keeps it shut, and it will only open with the correct code.

items.name: telescope
items.description: A brass telescope aimed out the window.
items.examine_text: An elegant brass telescope pointing toward the storm outside. Through the lens, you can make out a fog-draped valley and the silhouette of a ruined bell tower in the distance.

items.name: key fragment A
items.description: A strangely shaped metal shard that looks like part of a larger key.
items.examine_text: A shard of unknown alloy glowing with a faint blue light. Its shape suggests it is one-third of a larger key, and mysterious runes are etched across its surface.

items.name: four-poster bed
items.description: A once-lavish four-poster bed buried in dust.
items.examine_text: This bed must once have been magnificent. Four carved posts hold up tattered velvet drapes, while the mattress has sagged beneath layers of dust. There is nothing of interest under it.

items.name: nightstand
items.description: A delicate bedside table with a single drawer.
items.examine_text: A small, well-crafted bedside table coated in dust. It has one drawer, and the drawer is not locked.

items.name: small key
items.description: A small brass key.
items.examine_text: A neatly made brass key. The handle is engraved with the letter 'S', perhaps for 'Storage'.

items.name: diary
items.description: A leather-bound journal.
items.examine_text: An old journal wrapped in dark brown leather. The pages are yellowed, and every line is filled with hurried handwriting.

items.name: mirror
items.description: A yellowed mirror hanging on the wall.
items.examine_text: An ancient mirror with a tarnished surface. In the blurred reflection, you can just make out your own exhausted face. Moon-phase patterns decorate the frame.

items.name: fireplace
items.description: A large stone fireplace piled with dry wood.
items.examine_text: A broad stone fireplace loaded with dry, brittle wood. It looks easy enough to light, and the chimney still seems clear enough to draw smoke.

items.name: bucket
items.description: A rusty iron bucket.
items.examine_text: A rusted iron bucket. It is empty, but it still looks sturdy enough to hold something.

items.name: ladder
items.description: A wooden ladder leaning against the wall.
items.examine_text: A sturdy wooden ladder. It is old, but it still looks strong enough to support your weight. It should help you reach places that are otherwise out of reach.

items.name: pots
items.description: A jumble of old pots and pans scattered across the kitchen.
items.examine_text: Ordinary kitchenware, most of it rusted or broken. Nothing here seems especially useful.

items.name: toolbox
items.description: A metal toolbox sitting on a shelf.
items.examine_text: A red metal toolbox. It is a little rusty, but it still opens. There might be something useful inside.

items.name: key fragment B
items.description: A strangely shaped metal shard that looks like part of a larger key.
items.examine_text: A shard of unknown alloy glowing with a faint green light. Its shape suggests it is one-third of a larger key, and it looks like it could fit together with another fragment.

items.name: rope
items.description: A sturdy coil of rope.
items.examine_text: A coil of braided rope about five meters long. It is still strong and could probably be useful in the right situation.

items.name: oil lamp
items.description: A copper oil lamp with some fuel still inside.
items.examine_text: A finely made oil lamp with a glass cover. You can see that some lamp oil remains inside, and the wick appears to be intact.

items.name: wine barrels
items.description: Several enormous wine barrels line the wall.
items.examine_text: Huge oak barrels, each nearly as tall as a person. Most sound empty when you knock on them, but one still sloshes with liquid inside.

items.name: iron door
items.description: A rust-streaked iron door buried deep in the basement.
items.examine_text: A heavy iron door covered in rust. Its old lock is badly corroded, and the door refuses to move when you push on it. A little oil might loosen the mechanism, or perhaps some other tool could force it.

items.name: key fragment C
items.description: A strangely shaped metal shard that looks like part of a larger key.
items.examine_text: A shard of unknown alloy glowing with a faint red light. Its shape makes it clear that this is the final third of a larger key. With this piece, you should be able to assemble the whole thing.

items.name: Key of Awakening
items.description: A complete magical key assembled from three fragments, glowing with braided colors.
items.examine_text: The legendary Key of Awakening. The three fragments have fused perfectly into a single ornate key, and blue, green, and red light moves across its engraved runes. This key should be able to break the seal on the castle's main door.
